name: AxGard Towson
address: Bottom Floor of Towson Commons - Under Chipotle, 1 W Pennsylvania Ave Suite 117, Towson, MD 21204
about: AxGard Towson is a golf simulator venue located in Towson. The facility offers a modern environment for indoor golf experiences, though specific details about technology, pricing, and amenities are not prominently displayed on the website. The secure checkout by Square indicates a streamlined booking process. Best suited for casual golfers looking for a social experience with food and drinks.
why_golfers_like_it: Social atmosphere with food and drinks available

food_and_drink.notes: Food service is available, though specific details are not provided on the website.
No mention of alcohol service on the website; likely BYOB policy.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify, so it is recommended to contact the venue directly for details on club rentals or if you can bring your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: The website mentions food service, but it does not explicitly state if outside food or drinks are allowed. It is best to check with the venue beforehand.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide information on the average time to complete 18 holes, which can vary based on the simulator software and number of players in a bay.

faq.question: Is AxGard Towson kid-friendly?
faq.answer: There is no specific information regarding child-friendly features or policies on the website. It is recommended to contact the venue for details if planning to bring children.
